name: search_logs
description: Search logs in a configured log backend such as Loki. The query uses the backend's selection language, e.g. a LogQL stream selector.

connector.description: Name of the configured connector to query. Optional when exactly one connector serves this tool.

direction.description: Order of returned entries by timestamp: backward (newest first, the default) or forward (oldest first).

end.description: Search window end as RFC 3339 timestamp or Unix seconds.

limit.description: Maximum number of log entries to return, between 1 and 5000. Defaults to the backend's own limit.

query.description: Log selection query in the backend's language, e.g. the LogQL selector {app="api"} optionally followed by filter expressions.

start.description: Search window start as RFC 3339 timestamp or Unix seconds.
